page.title: Your Access Tokens List
page.subtitle: Here you can find all your Access Tokens. You can manage them or revoke a token.

scopes.readHelp: Read-only access — permits HTTP GET requests.
scopes.writeHelp: Write access — permits HTTP POST, PUT, and DELETE requests.
scopes.adminHelp: Full access — permits all HTTP methods.

create.title: Create a New Token
create.subtitle: Your new access token will be generated with the settings below.

reveal.heading: Your new access token
reveal.warning: This token will not be shown again. Copy it now.

revoke.heading: Revoke this token?
revoke.body: Any process using this token will stop working immediately. This cannot be undone.

empty.heading: No access tokens yet
empty.body: Generate a token to authenticate CLI tools, CI pipelines, or scripts against the QLM public API.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.expirationTooFar: Expiration must be within 365 days from today.
errors.expirationInPast: Expiration must be in the future.
